allow: Bash(cmd /c "taskkill /F /IM dahua-service.exe & taskkill /F /IM parking-service.exe & taskkill /F /IM combined-launcher.exe")
Bash(cmd /c "taskkill /F /IM dahua-service.exe 2>&1 && echo killed_dahua || echo not_running_dahua")

Bash(powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Name dahua-service -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Stop-Process -Name parking-service -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Stop-Process -Name combined-launcher -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep 1; Write-Host done")

Bash(powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Name dahua-service -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Stop-Process -Name parking-service -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Stop-Process -Name combined-launcher -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep 1; Write-Host stopped")
